sentence_1: Your four-year-old can't get the Lego piece to snap on, and suddenly she's hurling the entire bin at her brother's head.
sentence_2: Your six-year-old loses a board game and punches a hole in the couch cushion.
sentence_3: Your three-year-old bites another child at pickup, and you didn't even see it building.
